hooks.prompt: Allow completion only if the teammate has clearly stated: 1) files changed, 2) verification performed, and 3) any remaining risk. If anything is missing, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "what is missing"}.

If the teammate is going idle without a clear status update, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "Summarize current status, blockers, and next step before going idle."}. Otherwise respond with {"ok": true}.

hooks.command: osascript -e 'display notification "$CLAUDE_NOTIFICATION" with title "Claude Code"' 2>/dev/null; echo '{"ok": true}'
